allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command serve -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\" | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "$env:APPDATA\\npm" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)
